author: Jdthomas24
description: Monitor device check-in health across Zigbee, Z-Wave, Matter, Hub Mesh, LAN, Virtual and Hub Variable — learns each device's normal pattern and alerts you when something goes quiet.
releaseNotes: v1.4.6: Fixed State Attribute Overrides not showing presence/Life360, locks, water, smoke, contact, and motion devices on fresh hubs. Capability scanning now ensures newly paired devices appear before currentStates populates. Fixed Notifications section collapsing when toggling Enable Notifications.
